reviews.comment:
Para el asociado a ACA, en los surtidores les hacen los descuentos correspondientes, independientemente del medio de pago. En el bufet no se puede pagar con la APP de YPF, por lo cual le hacen los descuentos al socio de ACA en lo que ellos consideren

(Translated by Google)
ACA members receive the corresponding discounts at the pumps, regardless of the payment method. At the buffet, payment via the YPF app is not accepted, so ACA members receive discounts at their discretion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VNbi1rYkNaNmFQUkxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno el servicio en el Acá, como soy socia tengo estacionamiento gratituo en el lugar que queda en pleno centro de Bahia y descuento en las compras

The service at Acá is excellent. As a member, I have free parking at the location right in the center of Bahia and a discount on purchases.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRM2JTc1NREAE

reviews.comment:
Ayer 7/3 durante la lluvia no teníamos donde ir ya que estamos de paso en la ciudad,le pedimos x favor a la señorita q se encontraba en ese momento q nos permitiera estacionar ya q no había luz, las calles eran intransitables y el hotel q habiamos pasado la noche no se podia llegar x la cantidad de agua que había(1,5m.) pero con su "cara de pocos amigos nos dijo q no 😔
Dando vueltas buscando un lugar alto donde estacionar nos fuimos a GNC y nos ofrecieron q si no conseguimos hospedaje podemos quedarnos ahi estacionados...DIFERENCIA/EMPATIA.

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, March 7th, during the rain, we had nowhere to go since we were just passing through the city. We politely asked the young woman who was there at the time if she would let us park, as there were no streetlights, the streets were impassable, and the hotel where we had spent the night was inaccessible due to the amount of water (1.5 meters). But with a rather unfriendly expression, she told us no. 😔 After driving around looking for a higher place to park, we went to a gas station (GNC) and they offered us a place to stay if we couldn't find accommodation... DIFFERENCE/EMPATHY.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRaU42QjlnRRAB
